zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Margaret Clere於1375年出生在英國諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯時，她的父親Sir William Clere35歲，母親Dionisia Wichingham13歲。她於1393年與Sir William Appleyard在英國諾福爾可諾維其結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1419年12月在英國諾福爾可登斯頓享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Margaret Clere于1375年出生在英国諾福爾可格亞特 亞爾姆斯时，她的父亲Sir William Clere35岁，母亲Dionisia Wichingham13岁。她于1393年与Sir William Appleyard在英国諾福爾可諾維其结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1419年12月在英国諾福爾可登斯頓享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Clear
meanings: English (southeastern England, of Norman origin): from Clere, the French popular form of the personal name Clare 2, and possibly interchangeable with it or confused with it.

English (southeastern): probably a habitational name from clere, a component of several placenames in north Hampshire (Highclere, Burghclere, Kingsclere). This is probably from a Celtic stream name meaning ‘bright’ (cognate with Latin clarus ‘clear, bright’).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Klar   1.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Margaret Clere was born in 1375, in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir William Clere, was 35 and her mother, Dionisia Wichingham, was 13. She married Sir William Appleyard in 1393, in Norwich, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died in December 1419, in Dunston, Norfolk, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Margaret Clere est née en 1375, à Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Clere, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Dionisia Wichingham, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Appleyard en 1393, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en décembre 1419, à Dunston, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

ko.Ormesby St Michael, Norfolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 오메스비 스트 믹하얼
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Clere(이)가 1375년 영국 노르폴크 그리트 야모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Clere(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dionisia Wichingham(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1393년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 Sir William Appleyard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 12월 영국 노르폴크 던스턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Margaret Clere родилась в 1375 г. в местности грит ярмоут, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William Clere было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Dionisia Wichingham, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Appleyard в 1393 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла декабрь 1419 г. в местности дунстон, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.
